title: diplazium brachypodum
intro: Diplazium brachypodum, also known as the dwarf umbrella fern or lesser diplazium, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Diplazium brachypodum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, dried for infusions, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
